user.title: HA-LockBridge
user.description: Enter the host/port of your HA-LockBridge instance. Normally you don't need this — the bridge announces itself via Bonjour and Home Assistant should auto-discover it.

pair_confirm.title: Pair with HA-LockBridge
pair_confirm.description: Found a HA-LockBridge at {host}:{port}. Click Submit to start pairing. The bridge's Mac will pop up a window with **Approve** and **Deny** buttons — click Approve.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-pair with HA-LockBridge
reauth_confirm.description: The bridge at {host}:{port} no longer accepts the saved access token (it was reset or revoked). Click Submit, then click **Approve** in the window on the bridge's Mac to issue a fresh token. Nothing else changes.

select_devices.title: Select locks to expose
select_devices.description: Found {count} HomeKit lock(s). Each lock has its own switch below. ThorBolt X1 locks are flagged ✅ Verified and turned on by default — this integration is built for them. Turn on any other locks you'd also like to control from Home Assistant.

progress.awaiting_approval: Waiting for you to approve the pairing on the bridge…

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge at the given host/port.
error.missing_uuid_txt: Bridge announcement is missing the UUID record — incompatible version.

abort.already_configured: This bridge is already configured. (Its host/port were updated if they changed.)
abort.already_paired: This bridge is already paired with a Home Assistant instance. A bridge only allows one pairing at a time — on the bridge's Mac, click **Reset Pairing**, then add the integration again.
abort.missing_uuid_txt: Bridge announcement is missing the UUID record — incompatible version.
abort.pair_denied: You denied the pairing request on the bridge. To try again, remove this from the discovered list and re-add.
abort.pair_expired: The pairing request timed out without approval. Re-add to try again.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge to complete pairing.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-pairing succeeded — the bridge issued a fresh access token.

init.title: Select locks to expose
init.description: Each lock has its own switch — turn on the ones you want exposed as Home Assistant entities. ThorBolt X1 locks are flagged ✅ Verified. Turning a lock off removes its entities on the next reload.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge to fetch the current accessory list.

unsupported_protocol.title: HA-LockBridge: integration is older than the bridge
unsupported_protocol.description: The HA-LockBridge app reports wire protocol {bridge_protocol}, but this Home Assistant integration only understands up to {supported_protocol}. The integration keeps working with the features it knows, but newer bridge features may be ignored. Update the HA-LockBridge integration (via HACS) to clear this.
